channel.title: Fixture Australian Operations Signals
channel.description: Fixture feed for Lead Hunter tests

item.title: Aussie Logistics Co hiring Operations Automation Manager in Melbourne
item.description: Aussie Logistics Co is hiring for operations automation, reporting, support queue triage, invoice workflows, and customer onboarding across Australia.

item.title: Tiny Hobby Blog writes about a weekend project
item.description: Tiny Hobby Blog has no Australia business operations signal and no public evidence of workflow pain.
